title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, October 11 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 11/10/2022
Image reference: 2022-10-11_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-october-11-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have remained stable. Capesize Agia Trias (185,800 DWT, Jul 2002, Kawasaki) sold to Beks Shipmanagement and Trading SA for USD 15.50 mil, VV Value USD 13.35 mil - SS Due. Capesize Shinyo Guardian (177,200 DWT, Jan 2005, Namura) sold to Beks Shipmanagement and Trading SA for USD 17.25 mil, VV Value USD 15.96 mil - BWTS fitted.
